subject: Re: Is this good enough to install and run Warp?
body:
Hi Uhnsoo,

it probably won't affect performance, but rather the ability to run things 
at all. 16 GB might be OK. If it isn't, adding another 16 is fairly 
straight-forward if the system has a free RAM slot.

Cheers,
Dimitry

On Tuesday, November 20, 2018 at 9:57:46 PM UTC+1, uhnsoo@umich.edu wrote:
>
>
> It seems like it has two slots for the memory card and currently has one 
> 16GB RAM.
> Do you think it will be better to have another 16GB RAM ? or 16GB RAM 
> might be doable?
> The performance will be significantly influenced?
>
> Uhnsoo 
>
